title: General Manager - Business Development
description:
About the Role

As General Manager – Business Management, you will be responsible for driving the expansion of our online automotive marketplace business in the Asia-Pacific (APAC) region. You would ideally have extensive experience in automotive retail, both new and pre-owned vehicles, and a first-hand understanding of the market in APAC with a proven track record in managing successful automotive businesses.

Job Responsibilities

· Develop and execute a comprehensive regional market strategy for buying and selling both new and pre-owned cars, including market analysis, identifying key growth areas, and setting clear objectives.

· Accountable for the delivery of the marketplace annual plan P&L, including sales, contribution margin (ROI) and headcount as approved by Group management.

· Lead the opening of new branches in multiple countries to expand our regional market presence and reach a wider customer base.

· Oversee retail and wholesale operations in the region, managing a team of professionals to ensure optimal inventory management and pricing strategies in each market.

· Recruit, train, and manage high-performing country teams, and ensuring that they are aligned with the company's goals and values, while motivating them to achieve via a structured incentive program.

· Identify and develop valuable partnerships and collaborations in various markets to drive business growth and enhance the company's presence in the market.

· Establish and monitor key performance indicators (KPIs) to measure the success of the operations, making data-driven decisions to optimize performance.

· Ensure that all operations adhere to local regulations and standards and uphold Carro’s reputation and code of business conduct.

· Maintain a deep knowledge of used car markets and automotive industry in the region.

Job Requirements

· Bachelor's degree in business, management, or any related field (MBA or equivalent is a plus).

· At least 5+ years of proven experience in a senior leadership role within the automotive industry or a related field, preferable in a regional or global role.

· Experience in and deep knowledge of the automotive market in APAC and familiar with the consumer trends of the region.

· Demonstrated ability to drive growth and business expansion, P&L management, cost control.

· Strong financial acumen with analytical and problem-solving skills.

· Exceptional leadership and team management skills with proven record in managing and driving a high-performing team.

· Excellent networking and communication skills and the ability to effectively manage internal and external stakeholders.

· Technologically savvy and familiar with online retail of vehicles.

postedCompany.description: We are an online car marketplace that provide for sellers and buyers, to deal directly, while we provide excellent paperwork services, with full transparency.
postedCompany.name: TRUSTY CARS LTD.
